login.title: Welcome to NBS Project Builder
login.subtitle: Connect your CityCatalyst account to access your data.
login.sampleButtonDescription: Explore with sample data from Porto Alegre

citySelection.title: Select a City
citySelection.subtitle: Choose a city to view climate actions
citySelection.noCitiesFound: No cities match your search criteria.

cityInfo.title: City Information
cityInfo.noInventoriesDescription: This city doesn't have any emissions inventories available at the moment.
cityInfo.failedToLoadCity: Failed to load information for city
cityInfo.mitigationDescription: Actions to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and limit climate change.
cityInfo.adaptationDescription: Actions to build resilience and adapt to climate change impacts.
cityInfo.mitigationCardDescription: Explore evidence-based actions to reduce emissions and achieve climate targets.
cityInfo.adaptationCardDescription: Discover strategies to strengthen resilience against climate risks and impacts.
cityInfo.emptySelectedActionsHint: Go to the High Impact Action Prioritizer to identify actions that are relevant for your city

project.siteExplorerDescription: View elevation data and city boundaries on an interactive map
project.funderSelectionDescription: Find the right climate funding pathway and matching funds for your project
project.projectOperationsDescription: Define who owns, operates, and maintains your project for long-term success
project.businessModelDescription: Build a credible financing structure by identifying who pays, how, and for how long
project.contextModalDescription: All data collected across modules for this project
project.contextEmpty: No context data saved yet. Complete modules to build your project context.
project.impactModelDescription: Generate AI-powered impact narratives, co-benefits, and downstream signals to communicate your project's value

sections.prepareDescription: Build your project through guided modules
sections.outputDescription: Generate funding-ready deliverables from your project data

conceptNote.exportBannerDescription: Generate a GCF-style concept note from your project data across all modules
conceptNote.viewerDescription: GCF-style project concept note generated from your project data
conceptNote.noData: Complete more modules to populate this section

overview.emptyState: Not yet started — complete this module to see overview data

funderSelection.title: Funder Selection
funderSelection.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find the best funding pathway for your project

political.planRefs: Is this project formally referenced in an official plan?

planRefOptions.not_in_official_plan: Not yet included in an official plan

political.endorsement: Has this project received formal political endorsement?

endorsementOptions.written: Yes — written endorsement or resolution exists

political.ownership: Who is responsible for delivering this project?
political.alignment: Are key internal stakeholders aligned on pursuing this project?

alignmentOptions.medium: Partial alignment — some resistance or open questions

political.riskFactors: Are there foreseeable political or social risks that could delay or block this project?
political.commitment: If this project becomes slower, more expensive, or politically controversial, do you expect city leadership to continue supporting it?

funderSelection.projectDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what the project aims to achieve
funderSelection.budgetPreparation: Does the city have budget secured for project preparation?
funderSelection.budgetImplementation: Does the city have budget secured for implementation?
funderSelection.generatesRevenue: Is the project expected to generate revenue?
funderSelection.fundingReceiver: Who would receive or manage the funding?
funderSelection.canTakeDebt: Can the city legally take on debt?
funderSelection.nationalApproval: Is national-level approval or guarantee required?
funderSelection.openToBundling: Would the city consider bundling this project with others?

limitingFactors.earlyStage: Project at early stage - needs feasibility studies
limitingFactors.noBudgetPrep: No budget secured for project preparation
limitingFactors.noRevenue: No clear revenue source for loan repayment
limitingFactors.cannotBorrow: City cannot legally take on debt

results.whatThisMeans: What this type of funding is
results.topFundsDescription: These funds are ranked based on fit with your project profile
results.noFundsMatch: No funds in our database match the selected pathway. Consider expanding your search or adjusting project parameters.
results.disclaimer: Fund availability and priorities can change over time. This recommendation reflects structural fit and project readiness, not a guarantee of funding approval.
results.strategicTargetsDescription: These funders are a good structural fit for your project. Prepare now to be ready when the opportunity arises.
results.whyFit: Why this is a good fit

decision.title: Confirm Your Funding Plan
decision.subtitle: Select your primary funder now and optionally a target for later
decision.selectFromAbove: Click a fund above to select it, or choose from the options below
decision.overrideExplanation: This funder wasn't in the top recommendations. You may proceed, but review the fit assessment carefully.
decision.searchFunds: Search funds by name or institution...

updateBanner.message: Has anything changed in your city?
updateBanner.agentMessage: I want to update some information about my funding preparedness

siteExplorer.assetLoadErrorGeneric: Something went wrong while loading assets. Please try again.
siteExplorer.noAssetsErrorDescription: Try selecting a different category or zone.
siteExplorer.noZonesLoaded: Zones will appear here once loaded
siteExplorer.title: Site Explorer

interventionZones.title: Intervention Zones
interventionZones.description: City divided into zones based on dominant hazards and recommended interventions

interventions.sponge_network_desc: Floodable parks, detention basins, bioswales, wetlands
interventions.cooling_network_desc: Tree canopy corridors, green roofs, pocket parks, cool streets
interventions.multi_benefit_desc: Connectivity corridors, small retrofits, incremental resilience

modals.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
modals.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

om.overviewDescription: Review the imported context from previous steps before configuring O&M
om.operatingModelDescription: Choose how the project will be owned, operated, and maintained

modelsDesc.CITY_RUN: City department owns and operates all assets directly
modelsDesc.UTILITY_RUN: Municipal utility manages operations under service agreement
modelsDesc.CONTRACTOR_RUN: Private contractor handles O&M under multi-year contract
modelsDesc.COMMUNITY_STEWARDSHIP: Community organizations take ownership of maintenance
modelsDesc.HYBRID_SPLIT: Split responsibilities between city and community partners

om.rolesDescription: Assign entities to key operational roles

communityRolesDesc.BENEFICIARY: Community receives benefits but doesn't participate in operations
communityRolesDesc.STEWARD_OPERATOR: Community organizations take active role in maintenance and monitoring
communityRolesDesc.CO_OWNER_REVENUE_PARTICIPANT: Community shares in ownership and any revenue generated

om.taskPlanDescription: Define maintenance tasks, frequencies, and responsibilities
om.fundingDescription: Estimate O&M costs and select funding mechanisms
om.assumptionsPlaceholder: Describe the basis for your cost estimates...

capacityDesc.ADEQUATE: Existing staff and systems can handle O&M requirements
capacityDesc.PARTIAL_NEEDS_SUPPORT: Some capacity gaps exist that need external support
capacityDesc.INADEQUATE: Significant capacity building required before operations

om.capacityNotesPlaceholder: Add notes about capacity needs or support requirements...

blocker.defineTaskPlan: Define at least one maintenance task
blocker.selectFunding: Select at least one funding mechanism

om.addStakeholderDescription: Add a new stakeholder to this project
om.costBasisHelper: Roll-up uses site/technical quantities when available
om.playbookDescription: Review your complete O&M configuration before finalizing

bm.overviewDescription: Review the imported context from previous steps before configuring the business model
bm.payerBeneficiaryDescription: Identify who benefits from the project and who will pay for it
bm.beneficiariesHint: Select stakeholders who will benefit from the project outcomes
bm.candidatePayersHint: Select stakeholders who could potentially fund the project
bm.primaryPayerHint: Select the main entity responsible for funding the project
bm.archetypeDescription: Select the primary business model structure for your project

archetypesDesc.PUBLIC_PROGRAM: City-funded program with annual budget allocations
archetypesDesc.LAND_VALUE_CAPTURE: Funded through development fees and district levies
archetypesDesc.BLENDED_FINANCE: Mixed public, philanthropic, and private funding

bm.revenueStackDescription: Build a stack of revenue sources with confidence levels
bm.revenueNotesPlaceholder: Add notes about this revenue source...
bm.noHighConfidenceWarning: At least one HIGH confidence revenue line is required for bankability
bm.financingPathwayDescription: Select how the project will be financed

pathwaysDesc.PUBLIC_CAPEX: Traditional municipal capital expenditure from city budget
pathwaysDesc.DFI_LOAN: Concessional loan from development finance institution
pathwaysDesc.MUNICIPAL_BOND: Bond issuance backed by city creditworthiness
pathwaysDesc.BLENDED_VEHICLE: Mixed public, philanthropic, and private capital

bm.rationalePlaceholder: Explain why this financing pathway is appropriate...
bm.assumptionsPlaceholder: Describe the basis for your cost estimates...

checklist.oneHighConfidenceRevenueLine: At least one HIGH confidence revenue line

blocker.addHighConfidenceRevenue: Add at least one HIGH confidence revenue line

bm.contextActions: How would you like to proceed?
bm.contextAcceptedDesc: Prefilled data has been accepted. You can proceed to the next step.
bm.startedFromScratchDesc: Business model fields have been cleared. You can now configure from scratch.
bm.editContextDescription: Modify the imported values before proceeding
bm.paymentMechanismHintPlaceholder: How will payment flow? (e.g., direct budget allocation)

bestWhen.publicProgramBestWhen: Best when city has stable budget and strong political commitment
bestWhen.utilityServiceBestWhen: Best when utility has customer base and tariff authority
bestWhen.serviceContractBestWhen: Best when clear service deliverables can be defined
bestWhen.landValueCaptureBestWhen: Best when project area has development potential
bestWhen.blendedFinanceBestWhen: Best when project needs catalytic capital for risk mitigation
bestWhen.creditAddonBestWhen: Best when NBS can generate verified carbon/ecosystem credits
bestWhen.insuranceLinkedBestWhen: Best when project reduces insurable climate risks
bestWhen.publicCapexBestWhen: Best when city has investment-grade credit rating
bestWhen.dfiLoanBestWhen: Best when project meets DFI eligibility criteria
bestWhen.municipalBondBestWhen: Best when city has established bond issuance track record
bestWhen.blendedVehicleBestWhen: Best when multiple capital sources are available
bestWhen.pppLightBestWhen: Best when private sector efficiency gains are significant
bestWhen.philanthropyOnlyBestWhen: Best for pilot projects or capacity building phases

bm.addOnRevenuesDescription: Optional supplementary revenue streams to complement your primary archetype

addOnsDesc.CREDIT_ADDON: Revenue from verified carbon or ecosystem credits

bm.whyGoodFit: Why This Is a Good Fit

financingAutoRationale.PUBLIC_CAPEX: City has stable credit and can fund through traditional capital expenditure
financingAutoRationale.DFI_LOAN: Project aligns with DFI climate priorities and city has borrowing capacity
financingAutoRationale.MUNICIPAL_BOND: City credit rating supports bond issuance for infrastructure
financingAutoRationale.BLENDED_VEHICLE: Project benefits from mixing catalytic philanthropic capital with public funding
financingAutoRationale.PPP_LIGHT: Private sector can deliver efficiency gains while city retains ownership
financingAutoRationale.PHILANTHROPY_ONLY: Philanthropic funding is sufficient for pilot or demonstration phase

bm.romBudgetDescription: Rough Order of Magnitude budget ranges for financing pathway assessment
bm.consistencyRecurringRevenue: Primary durable revenue source with 3+ year duration
bm.consistencyOpexCovered: OPEX/O&M costs covered by at least one revenue line
bm.consistencyMrvCovered: MRV costs covered by at least one revenue line
bm.bankabilityAssessmentSubtitle: Assess confidence, gaps, and next steps to make the business model finance-ready.

maturityDesc.CONCEPT_NOTE: Basic structure defined but key elements missing for financing readiness
maturityDesc.EMERGING: Core elements in place but needs strengthening for bankability
maturityDesc.BANKABLE_DRAFT: Ready for financing discussions with strong payer commitment and revenue confidence

bankabilityBlocker.payerNotConfirmed: Primary payer not yet confirmed - strengthen commitment level
bankabilityBlocker.paymentMechanismIncomplete: Payment mechanism type or basis not fully defined
bankabilityBlocker.noConfidentRevenue: No medium or high confidence revenue lines identified
bankabilityBlocker.opexNotCoveredBeyondEstablishment: OPEX coverage not secured beyond establishment phase
bankabilityBlocker.mrvRequiredForOutcomeModel: MRV/verification budget required for outcome-linked payment model

bm.enablingActionsDesc: Required actions to enable the business model
bm.risksDesc: Identify and manage business model risks

riskLevelTooltip.LOW: Low probability or impact - monitor but no immediate action needed
riskLevelTooltip.MEDIUM: Moderate probability or impact - mitigation plan recommended
riskLevelTooltip.HIGH: High probability and/or impact - requires active mitigation

bm.playbookSubtitle: Review, refine, and export a concept-note-ready summary of your business model.

impactModel.title: Impact Model
impactModel.subtitle: Generate AI-powered impact narratives to communicate your project's value

quantify.title: Quantify Impacts
quantify.description: Generate evidence-grounded KPIs from your knowledge base

narrate.title: Generate Narrative
narrate.description: Generate prose narrative blocks grounded in your quantified KPIs
narrate.noQuantifiedData: Please complete the Quantify step first before generating a narrative

impactModel.bundlesDescription: Select which intervention zones to include in the impact narrative
impactModel.selectZonesFirst: Complete the Site Explorer module to select intervention zones
impactModel.generateDescription: Use AI to generate a comprehensive impact narrative based on your project context
impactModel.curateDescription: Review and edit the generated narrative blocks
impactModel.goToGenerate: Go to the Generate step to create your impact narrative
impactModel.returnToSetup: Return to Setup and click 'Generate Narrative' to create your impact story
impactModel.coBenefitsDescription: Review and select which co-benefits to include
impactModel.lensesDescription: View your narrative through different analytical perspectives

lensDescriptions.neutral: Balanced view presenting all impact dimensions equally
lensDescriptions.climate: Emphasizes climate mitigation and adaptation outcomes
lensDescriptions.social: Focuses on equity, health, and community benefits
lensDescriptions.financial: Highlights economic value and return on investment
lensDescriptions.institutional: Addresses governance, capacity, and policy implications

impactModel.useBaseNarrative: Using base narrative in neutral lens
impactModel.exportDescription: Export your impact narrative and push signals to downstream modules
impactModel.signalsDescription: Push relevant signals to Operations and Business Model modules
impactModel.opsSignalsPushed: O&M signals pushed to Operations module
impactModel.bmSignalsPushed: Revenue signals pushed to Business Model module
impactModel.narrativeReady: Your impact narrative is ready for review
impactModel.generationFailed: Failed to generate narrative. Please try again.
impactModel.savedDescription: Your impact model has been finalized and saved
impactModel.savedToDatabase: Your work has been saved to the database
impactModel.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
impactModel.autoSaveFailed: Auto-save failed. Use the Save button to save manually.
impactModel.selectProjectsFirst: Please enable at least one project in the Setup step
impactModel.regeneratePromptPlaceholder: E.g., Focus more on community benefits, or add specific metrics about water savings...
impactModel.blockRegeneratedDesc: The block has been updated with new content
impactModel.regenerationFailed: Failed to regenerate block. Please try again.
impactModel.generateFirst: Generate the base narrative first before applying analytical lenses
impactModel.neutralIsBase: The neutral lens displays your base narrative without any perspective adjustments
impactModel.customInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g., Emphasize carbon credits, or focus on vulnerable populations...
impactModel.lensGeneratedDesc: The lens variant has been generated successfully
impactModel.lensGenerationFailed: Failed to generate lens variant. Please try again.
impactModel.usingSampleDataHint: No site interventions saved yet. These are sample zones for exploration. Complete the Site Explorer module to use your own data.
impactModel.bundlesDescriptionExpanded: Select intervention zones and review the specific interventions for each
impactModel.noInterventionsInZone: No interventions added to this zone yet
impactModel.regenerateInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g., Focus more on community benefits, add specific metrics...

lensHeadlines.climate: Climate-focused narrative emphasizing emissions and adaptation
lensHeadlines.social: Community-centered view highlighting equity and wellbeing
lensHeadlines.financial: Investment-oriented analysis of returns and value
lensHeadlines.institutional: Governance lens on capacity and policy alignment

impactModel.selectLensToExport: Select which lens version to export
